notes: v1.14.100 - Move roadmap Step 6 straggler: Deployment Issue Log (twin) re-homed into a new Work 'Issues' subtab. It was reachable only via the legacy NOW 'NERVE' tile, so it was lost in the New UI. redesign_homeIssues() re-parents the live #issue-page node out of pg-twin into #wk-issues at boot (flag-gated); the Issues subtab tap calls issue_pageOpen() to render the list. Added wk-issues to STAB_GROUPS['work-sub'] + showWorkTab issues-render for cmd_route entry. Reuse-not-rebuild; FIELD mode (?redesign=0) leaves pg-twin whole and the NOW tile/showPage('twin') unchanged. With this, every legacy 5-tab surface now has a New-UI path (Command/Work[Deploy/Scan/Handoff/Issues]/Ref[Optics/Hardware/CLI/HWRef/Know/Compass]/Profile/Load Master).
